Low Power Divisor Latch Low

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x20
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Lower 8 bits of the 16-bit Low Power baud rate divisor for IrDA SIR low-power mode. Must give a baud rate of 115.2 kHz. Only accessible when DLAB=1 and not busy. Only present when SIR_LP_RX is configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] reserved rw 0x0 -
[7:0] lpdll rw 0x0 LPDLL
